0.9.17.notes: Orchestrator context compaction: /compact called after each phase-exit signal with a checkpoint line to preserve loop bookkeeping across the compact.

0.9.16.notes: Fix file generation integrity: skills included in default regenerate, consistent -skills.md naming, validate_task workflow in generation, all schemas copied by update-tools, hash recording for init and update-tools, post-regeneration structure verification.
manual: Run /forge:regenerate skills to adopt the new -skills.md naming convention

0.9.15.notes: Named-agent IPC: orchestrator-owned phase banners with exit signals, file-based progress log with Monitor streaming, store-cli progress/progress-clear commands, agent naming convention {taskId}:{persona}:{phase}:{iteration} (GH-46).

0.9.14.notes: Fix BUG-041/042/043/044: re-derive FORGE_ROOT after plugin update, add plugin-installed schema fallback to store-cli/validate-store, copy schemas during init, remove hardcoded model names from orchestrate_task.md, add cluster-based model dispatch using env vars (v1+v2 of capability-based dispatch, see GH-45).

0.9.13.notes: Sprint S09 cap release: init phase renumbering (T01), calibrationBaseline + required-field config schema (T02), init completeness guard + calibration baseline write (T03), health config-completeness + KB freshness checks (T04), calibrate command — drift detection + surgical patches (T05), sprint-plan SPRINT_PLAN.md output path (T06), add-task mid-sprint command (T07), BUG-008 persona/persona injection fix, BUG-009 structure manifest + clear-namespace, banner library with agent identity. Run /forge:update after installing.

0.9.12.notes: Add-task: add /forge:add-task command for adding tasks to existing sprints mid-flight — mini intake interview, sequential ID assignment, store write, and collate.

0.9.11.notes: Calibrate: add /forge:calibrate command for drift detection, four-category drift classification, surgical regeneration patches with Architect approval gate, and calibrationHistory audit trail in .forge/config.json.

0.9.10.notes: Health: add config-completeness check (validates .forge/config.json required fields, exits early if incomplete) and KB freshness check (compares MASTER_INDEX.md hash against calibrationBaseline, categorizes drift as technical or business).

0.9.9.notes: Init: add completeness guard (verifies all required config fields before proceeding) and calibration baseline write (records project state at init time for /forge:calibrate drift detection) to Phase 5 of sdlc-init.md.

0.9.8.notes: Banner library: add forge/tools/banners.cjs (10 agent identities, 3 render modes: full/badge/mark) and forge/tools/banners.sh (bash wrapper). Wire banners into meta personas (Banner field + banner command in Persona block format) and orchestrator announcement algorithms (BANNER_MAP + badge display before each phase spawn). Subagent identity injection now runs the banner command as first action instead of printing a plain text line.

0.9.7.notes: Structure manifest: add check-structure.cjs and build-manifest.cjs for deterministic generated-file verification; add clear-namespace to generation-manifest.cjs (with prefix-shape guard); integrate structure check into forge:health and forge:update. Fixes 14 stale generation-manifest entries from role-based naming. CUSTOM_COMMAND_TEMPLATE.md now tracked in structure-manifest (57 expected files, up from 56).

0.9.6.notes: Fix fix-bug persona assignment: plan-fix and implement use bug-fixer, review-plan and review-code use supervisor, approve uses architect, commit uses engineer — mirrors the task orchestrator's role-to-noun separation of concerns. Adds ROLE_TO_NOUN table to the generated fix_bug.md announcement algorithm.

0.9.5.notes: Fix fix-bug triage: locate-or-create gate ensures bug record and engineering folder are created via store-cli before any read/classify step — prevents LLM from bypassing store library with direct file writes. Add githubIssue optional URI field to bug.schema.json.

0.9.4.notes: Fix BUG-008: meta-fix-bug.md gains complete PERSONA_MAP + spawn_subagent announcement algorithm with noun-based persona/skill injection; orchestrate_task.md regenerated with correct ROLE_TO_NOUN lookup and tagline+model in announcement; .forge/personas/ and .forge/skills/ regenerated with noun-based filenames.

0.9.3.notes: Fix sprint-plan: SPRINT_PLAN.md now written to explicit path engineering/sprints/{sprintId}/SPRINT_PLAN.md — prevents root-level or missing placement. Run /forge:update and regenerate workflows:architect_sprint_plan.

0.9.2.notes: Init phase renumbering — fractional phases (1.5, 3b) replaced with sequential integers (1-11), checkpoint values now integers, banners updated to N/11 format. Existing init-progress.json files with old phase keys will trigger a fresh start (graceful degradation). Run /forge:update to regenerate commands.

0.9.1.notes: CLI engagement — init pre-flight plan, phase/step banners, checkpoint/resume, per-file status lines, batch Step 5 audit, command name frontmatter, list-skills moved from hooks to tools, schema updates (event tokens, sprint path, task feature_id, abandoned status), seed-store bug status default

0.9.0.notes: Store Repair command and validate-store JSON output: new /forge:store:repair slash command for diagnosing and repairing corrupted store records, validate-store.cjs gains --json flag for structured output and --fix --dry-run combination for previewing fixes, validate-store tool spec updated with JSON output format and error categories.

0.8.10.notes: Store Custodian — deterministic store gateway: new store-cli.cjs CLI, store-custodian skill and tool spec, 16 meta-workflows migrated from direct store writes to custodian, collate/validate-store facade bypass closures, sprint schema gains goal and features fields. Run /forge:update to regenerate workflows, skills, and tools.

0.8.6.notes: forge:health now accepts --path <dir> to run against a project other than the current working directory.

0.8.5.notes: forge:update canary detection now uses /.claude/plugins/ prefix — marketplace installs (/.claude/plugins/marketplaces/) no longer misidentified as canary source installs.

0.8.4.notes: forge:init now generates workflows with canonical names (plan_task.md, implement_plan.md, review_plan.md, review_code.md, fix_bug.md, commit_task.md, update_plan.md, update_implementation.md) — drops legacy engineer_/supervisor_ prefixes.

0.8.3.notes: forge:init now uses effort: frontmatter (low/medium/high/max) in generated .claude/commands/ stubs instead of model: — capability-based, model-agnostic.

0.8.2.notes: collate: add --purge-events flag — generates COST_REPORT.md then atomically deletes the event directory; works for both sprint IDs (generates COST_REPORT first) and bug IDs (purge only); retrospective and fix-bug workflows updated to use the flag instead of ad-hoc file deletion.

0.8.1.notes: Event summarisation and purge at lifecycle close: retrospective now runs collate (materialises COST_REPORT.md) then purges sprint events before emitting the tombstone; fix-bug now summarises token cost into the bug artifact then purges bug events before emitting the tombstone.

0.8.0.notes: forge:init now writes .forge/update-check-cache.json and .forge/generation-manifest.json in the smoke-test Stamp step — anchors the migration baseline so /forge:update correctly detects workflow drift after upgrades.

0.7.11.notes: Sprint S06: orchestrator persona noun-based lookup, meta-workflows purged of inline Persona sections, forge:regenerate now includes personas by default, ghost event file bug fixed, false breaking-change confirmation suppressed in forge:update, sprint schema gains path field, slug-aware directory discovery added to seed-store/collate/validate-store.

0.7.10.notes: validate-store: add Pass 3 filesystem consistency checks — slug-aware directory walk detects orphaned sprint/task directories, dangling path fields; all new checks emit warnings (not errors) for backward compatibility.

0.7.9.notes: collate: resolve sprint directory names from sprint.path field in MASTER_INDEX task link generation; fix task link resolution for engineering-rooted task paths (directory vs. file path distinction).

0.7.8.notes: Add personas to forge:regenerate defaults: default run sequence is now workflows + commands + templates + personas; per-persona sub-target support added (e.g. /forge:regenerate personas engineer or personas:engineer).

regenerate.patch: personas is now part of the default regeneration run. Run /forge:regenerate personas to generate .forge/personas/ if not already present.

0.7.7.notes: Slug-aware seed-store discovery and path construction: three-tier regex for sprints/tasks/bugs with slug-named directories; populate sprint path field; add deriveSlug() utility; fix bare-task number extraction for T10+ directories; add BUG-NNN-slug partial-prefix bug discovery tier.

0.7.6.notes: Purify meta-workflows: remove all inline ## Persona sections; standalone commands gain Persona Self-Load instructions that read .forge/personas/{noun}.md at runtime; sprint-intake reassigned from Architect to Product Manager (🗻→🌸).

regenerate.patch: Remove ## Persona sections from all generated workflows. Standalone command workflows (sprint-intake, sprint-plan, retrospective, collate, fix-bug, review-sprint-completion) gain a Persona Self-Load instruction as their first step. Sprint-intake changes persona from Architect to Product Manager (🗻→🌸). Orchestrator-spawned workflows no longer contain inline persona content — persona is injected at spawn time.

0.7.5.notes: Add optional `path` field to sprint schema with backward-compatible WARN on missing path; add warn() function to validate-store for non-fatal advisories.

0.7.4.notes: Suppress false breaking-change confirmation in forge:update: auto-skip model-override manual step when config.pipelines only uses standard Forge aliases (sonnet, opus, haiku).

0.7.3.notes: Fix ghost event files: store.cjs writeEvent detects and renames mismatched filenames before writing; validate-store --fix renames files instead of creating duplicates on eventId backfill. Collision check prevents silent overwrites.

0.7.2.notes: Fix orchestrator persona lookup: noun-based filenames via ROLE_TO_NOUN (plan->engineer, approve->architect, etc.) instead of role-based; announcement line includes task ID, tagline, and resolved model.

regenerate.patch: Replace role-based persona/skill file lookups with noun-based lookups via ROLE_TO_NOUN map. Update announcement line to include task ID, tagline, and resolved model.

0.7.1.notes: Japanese nature persona palette: 🗻 Architect, 🌸 Product Manager, 🍵 QA Engineer; persona announcements wired into orchestrator — each agent announces itself on start; emoji H1 prefixes on all workflow meta templates.

regenerate.patch: Add PERSONA_MAP (emoji/name/tagline per role) before the while loop; resolve tagline alongside emoji and persona_name; add print() announcement before spawn; prepend announce instruction to spawn_subagent prompt; update description field to include emoji and persona_name.
Prefix H1 title with persona emoji (e.g. '# 🗻 Workflow: Approve Task'). Persona declaration lines updated to use new emojis where applicable (⛰️→🗻 Architect, 📋→🌸 PM, 🧪→🍵 QA).

0.7.0.notes: Grounding & Descriptive Pathing: transition to ID-description folder naming and explicit absolute path injection in subagent prompts to eliminate model 'path guessing'.

0.6.13.notes: Portability migration: transition from legacy 'model: <id>' fields to structured 'requirements' blocks in generated workflows to support the 3D Agent Model and symmetric injection.
manual: Check .forge/config.json for custom 'model' overrides in config.pipelines. If present, manually migrate these to the 'requirements' block format in corresponding workflow artifacts.

0.6.12.notes: Implement forge/tools/store.cjs facade for standardized store CRUD operations (Sprints, Tasks, Bugs, Events, Features) and FSImpl backend.

0.6.11.notes: Fix collate: resolveDir gains numeric glob fallback for sprint IDs without hyphens (e.g. S31 → sprint_31_slug/); loadSprintEvents backfills taskId/role/action from sidecar filename when JSON lacks attribution fields.

0.6.10.notes: Fix /forge:update: stop hardcoding skillforge distribution URL — always read updateUrl/migrationsUrl from installed plugin.json (fixes 404 on skillforge update check).

0.6.9.notes: Fix validate-store 'abandoned' enum gap; add meta-review-sprint-completion workflow; add 'validate' role to pipeline schema; update default/bug pipeline examples to include validate phase; document pipeline ownership model (default is Forge-managed, create named copies to customise); document manual pipeline assignment.
manual: In .forge/config.json: add a 'validate' phase between 'review-code' and 'approve' in config.pipelines.default (command: 'validate', role: 'validate', model: 'opus'). Also add it to config.pipelines.bug if present. The hotfix pipeline intentionally omits validate.
In .forge/config.json: add a description to config.pipelines.default: 'Forge-managed default pipeline. Do not modify — to customise, create a named pipeline as a copy.'

0.6.8.notes: QA validate phase: new meta-qa-engineer and meta-product-manager personas, meta-validate workflow, validate phase wired into default pipeline in meta-orchestrate; sprint-intake gains PM persona header; update command gains cross-distribution downgrade detection.

0.6.7.notes: Switch skillforge distribution to git-subdir from forge release branch; remove hardcoded SKILLFORGE_UPDATE_URL from check-update.js — each branch's plugin.json now carries its own updateUrl.

0.6.6.notes: Remove dead Bash hook duplicates: check-update.sh and list-skills.sh deleted; hooks have been JS-only since initial registration in hooks.json.

0.6.5.notes: Distribution-aware update-check cache: hooks persist distribution and forgeRoot in .forge/update-check-cache.json and refresh paths.forgeRoot in config.json on every session start; /forge:update refreshes paths.forgeRoot in Step 6 and handles cross-distribution downgrade scenario.

0.6.4.notes: Path-based distribution detection: hooks derive update URL from plugin cache path pattern (/cache/skillforge/forge/) instead of reading updateUrl from plugin.json — eliminates plugin.json patching during skillforge submodule bumps.

0.6.3.notes: Distribution-aware update URLs: updateUrl and migrationsUrl added to plugin.json so each distribution (forge, skillforge, etc.) checks its own mother repo for updates instead of always hitting Entelligentsia/forge main.

0.6.2.notes: Fix /forge:update migration baseline: move update-check-cache.json to .forge/ (project-scoped) so multi-project machines don't share migration state across projects.

0.6.1.notes: Housekeeping: sync sprint.schema.md to include goal/features/feature_id fields, remove dead FALLBACK object from validate-store.cjs, add re-spawn guard to run_sprint workflow for subagents that return mid-pipeline.
manual: You can safely delete .forge/schemas/ from existing projects — validate-store.cjs embeds schemas internally since 0.6.1 and no longer reads from that directory

0.6.0.notes: Lean migration architecture: eliminate tools regenerate target (schemas now embedded in validate-store), introduce colon-delimited granular regeneration sub-targets for workflows and knowledge-base, retroactively correct 0.6.0 migration entry. No user-facing file regeneration required.
manual: You can safely delete .forge/schemas/ from existing projects — validate-store.cjs now embeds schemas internally and no longer reads from that directory

0.5.9.notes: FORGE-S02 — Foundational Concepts Documentation + Feature Tier: new Feature entity (feature.schema.json, .forge/store/features/), feature_id nullable field added to sprint and task schemas, collate generates engineering/features/ registry, validate-store enforces feature referential integrity, seed-store scaffolds features/ on init, sprint-intake/plan wired to feature linkage, /forge:health reports per-feature FEAT-ID test coverage, docs/concepts/ section added, default-workflows.md absorbed into concepts, README and vision synced.

0.5.8.notes: Collate meta-templates now emit a runtime FORGE_ROOT read instead of baking the absolute plugin cache path — regenerated workflows no longer go stale on version bumps.

0.5.7.notes: forge:update no longer shows an install prompt when the plugin is already current — project migrations now use a separate Step 2B flow with clear messaging.

0.5.6.notes: forge:update now detects canary/source installs and skips the plugin-manager install step, going directly to migrations.

0.5.5.notes: fix-bug is now a true orchestrator (chained subagents, revision loop, plain status codes, announcement banners); collate COST_REPORT.md now writes to the correct descriptive sprint dir instead of creating SNN/ stubs.

0.5.4.notes: Fix validate-store: allow null endTimestamp/durationMinutes on start events; add event backfill rules so --fix repairs pre-schema FORGE-S01 events.

0.5.3.notes: 0.5.x patch: fix command scope boundary, stale session context, install guidance.

0.5.2.notes: 0.5.x patch: fix command scope boundary, stale session context, install guidance.

0.5.1.notes: 0.5.x patch: fix command wrapper regeneration and scope boundary.

0.5.0.notes: 0.5.x patches: fix command wrapper regeneration, pipeline command renames in config, retired file cleanup, scope boundary for custom commands.

0.4.1.notes: Japanese-style marks (〇△×🌱🌿⛰️) across all output; agent personas gain symbols and first-person announcements in workflows; built-in commands renamed plan/review-plan/review-code (update step 5b-pre detects old engineer.md/supervisor.md); generation-manifest tool tracks generated file modifications; engineering/tools/ eliminated — all tools invoked from $FORGE_ROOT/tools/; workflow field added to pipeline phases for custom command routing; paths.tools removed, paths.forgeRoot and paths.customCommands added to schema.

0.4.0.notes: Backfill explicit model fields on pipeline phases in config.json — fixes orchestrator falling through to unreliable prose role-default table (closes #19).
manual: Run model backfill on existing pipelines: node engineering/tools/manage-config.cjs pipeline backfill-models

0.3.15.notes: Token Usage Tracking sprint (FORGE-S01): event schema gains optional token fields, collate generates COST_REPORT.md, estimate-usage fallback tool, orchestrator subagent self-reporting and sidecar merge, retrospective cost analysis and baselines, bug report opt-in for token data.

0.3.14.notes: Fix model assignment in orchestrator: spawn_subagent now passes explicit model per phase (phase.model from config → role-based default). Unified /forge:update UX: checks GitHub, shows changelog, guides install, and applies migrations in one command.

0.3.13.notes: Fix validate-store: nullable FK support (sprintId/taskId), event taskId checked against bugs, virtual sprint dirs accepted, --fix backfills sprint.createdAt and bug.reportedAt; align spec fallback list with schema (closes #15, #16).

0.2.0.notes: Pluggable pipeline routing, /forge:add-pipeline command, manage-config tool spec, extended /forge:regenerate with tools and knowledge-base categories.

0.3.0.notes: Fix /forge:update shell permission error — replaced inline node one-liners with Read/Write tool instructions.

0.3.1.notes: Fix /forge:update cache path when CLAUDE_PLUGIN_DATA is unset — now resolves to /tmp/forge-plugin-data/ instead of /forge-plugin-data/.

0.3.2.notes: Fix seed-store camelCase/snake_case mismatch — spec now explicitly requires camelCase field names matching validate-store (fixes 167 false-positive errors from /forge:health).

0.3.3.notes: Fix /forge:add-pipeline and /forge:report-bug — convert body-section ! patterns to plain code blocks so they are not auto-executed at skill expansion time with literal placeholder text.

0.3.4.notes: Add error triage: PostToolUse hook detects Forge tool failures and prompts bug filing; On error footer added to all command files; /forge:report-bug now auto-fills from conversation context.

0.3.5.notes: Graceful error handling across all plugin scripts and tool specs: hooks exit 0 on failure (never surface noise), utility scripts degrade to known exit codes, tool specs now require top-level exception handlers in generated tools.

0.3.6.notes: Ship tools as pre-built Node.js CJS scripts (collate, seed-store, validate-store, manage-config) and JSON Schema files; Phase 8 copies instead of generating; eliminates project-language dependency for tooling; adds JSON Schema backing for all store types (closes #10).

0.3.12.notes: Drop TIMESHEET generation from collate; make event model field required with CLI-agnostic full model ID (not short alias); add timing capture instructions to orchestrate event emission.

0.3.11.notes: Fix collate writing TIMESHEETs to wrong sprint dir and generating broken MASTER_INDEX links when sprint/task dirs use the full ID (e.g. HEDIS-S01) instead of the trailing segment (e.g. S01).

0.3.10.notes: Fix context accumulation in sprint runner and task orchestrator — each phase now runs as an Agent tool subagent (fresh context per phase/task), keeping the orchestrator itself light and nimble (closes BUG-001).

0.3.9.notes: Fix orchestrator revision loop: meta-orchestrate.md now specifies a concrete executable algorithm with verdict detection from review artifacts and on_revision routing; sdlc-config.schema.json adds on_revision field to pipeline phases (closes #14).

0.3.8.notes: check-update hook now prompts /forge:update after a plugin install is detected (when .forge/config.json exists).

0.3.7.notes: Fix collate statusBadge() double-status rendering; fix validate-store false failures (null fields, prefixed sprint IDs, sprint-level events); add 'abandoned' to sprint/task schemas; add /forge:migrate command for interactive pre-Forge store migration (closes #11, #12, #13).

0.8.7.notes: Fix sprint-plan: generated workflows now create task folders and TASK_PROMPT.md for each task, so plan_task has a source of truth to read.

0.8.8.notes: Fix eager-model compliance: sprint-plan command no longer pre-loads MASTER_INDEX (workflow owns context loading); sprint-plan workflow gains Iron Laws guard against self-directed planning and coding.

0.8.9.notes: Fix forge:update Step 4: Iron Laws block models from calling generation-manifest.cjs record directly (skipping actual regeneration); adds sub-target filename resolution rule to prevent prefix stripping.
